title: The Prison Experience
description: Podcast episode script detailing the experience of incarceration, focused on presenting oral histories to display first-hand accounts.

subject: Incarceration, Incarceration Issues.

title: Origins of Incarceration
description: Podcast episode script focusing on the roots or origins of mass incarceration in slavery, chain gangs, and more. Utilizes primary and secondary sources to show how incarceration reinvented itself.
creator: Quinton Bradford
subject: Incarceration, Incarceration Issues.

title: Rehabilitation, Community, and Progress
description: Podcast episode script detailing how communities can move past mass incarceration and become self-sufficent, building community does in fact show results and those that are much more promising than the current system.
creator: Quinton Bradford
subject: Incarceration, Incarceration Issues.

filename: Omega Wilson and Brenda Wilson Oral History.docx
title: Omega and Brenda Wilson Oral History Transcript
description: Oral history with Omega Wilson and his wife, Brenda, detailing their lives as well as their growth of the West End Revitilization Association to help combat against environmental issues.
creator: Quinton Bradford
subject: Environmental Action Groups, Black History

title: African American Material Culture and Space in Greensboro, North Carolina
description: Essay focused on material culture during the Civil Rights Movement in Greensboro. Utilizing stools from the Woolworth sit-ins to display how space played an active role.
creator: Quinton Bradford
subject: Material Culture, Civil Rights Movements--North Carolina--Greensboro

title: Ancient Nationalism: How Roman Leaders Used Material Culture and the Past to Consolidate and Hold Power
description: Essay displaying how Roman leaders used the reign of past emperors and the material culture that goes along with it to usurp power through the use of nostalgia and the "better Rome."
creator: Quinton Bradford
subject: Rome--Antiquities
